creator: kristinacors
caption:
This New Google Travel Hack For Hotels Can Save You HUNDREDS 👀 Save This Before Your Next Trip! 
#travelhacks #Aitravelhacks #travelplanning #luxuryhotels #giftedbygoogle

transcription.text: Oh my god, I was just about to book this five-star hotel and the price jumped $400. That's exactly why I never book without tracking first. Tracking for hotels? Yeah, Google just rolled out hotel price tracking a few days ago. Wait, really? How does it work? You search the hotel on Google Hotels, select your exact dates, and then turn on the track prices toggle. It monitors your hotel rate and then emails you when it drops. So you book at the lowest point without constantly checking. Oh my god, I've been dying for this. Wait, how do you even know about this if it just rolled out a few days ago? I follow Christina. She was invited to Google's Summer Travel Creator Summit hosted by Google, so she finds this stuff before it blows up. If you care about travel hacks, you should follow her.
